content.content:
1â†’import React, { useState } from 'react';
     2â†’import { ScrollView, View, Pressable } from 'react-native';
     3â†’import {
     4â†’  Text,
     5â†’  Box,
     6â†’  CardPoints,
     7â†’  Header,
     8â†’  Icon,
     9â†’  SearchUsed,
    10â†’  SeparatorHorizontal,
    11â†’} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
    12â†’import type { Meta, StoryObj } from 'storybook/internal/types';
    13â†’import type { SDUIScreen } from '../services/sdui/models';
    14â†’import ScreenRenderer from '../services/sdui/renderer/ScreenRenderer';
    15â†’import { registerAllAdapters } from '../services/sdui/adapters';
    16â†’import { useSDUIJsonEditor } from '../../.storybook/addons/json-editor';
    17â†’import {
    18â†’  extractHistoryLoaded,
    19â†’  extractHistoryEmpty,
    20â†’} from '../services/sdui/mocks';
    21â†’
    22â†’registerAllAdapters();
    23â†’
    24â†’type ViewState = 'loaded' | 'empty';
    25â†’
    26â†’const SCREENS: Record<ViewState, SDUIScreen> = {
    27â†’  loaded: extractHistoryLoaded,
    28â†’  empty: extractHistoryEmpty,
    29â†’};
    30â†’
    31â†’function ViewToggle({
    32â†’  selected,
    33â†’  onSelect,
    34â†’}: {
    35â†’  selected: ViewState;
    36â†’  onSelect: (v: ViewState) => void;
    37â†’}) {
    38â†’  const labels: Record<ViewState, string> = {
    39â†’    loaded: 'Loaded (8)',
    40â†’    empty: 'Empty',
    41â†’  };
    42â†’
    43â†’  return (
    44â†’    <View style={{ flexDirection: 'row', gap: 8, marginBottom: 16 }}>
    45â†’      {(['loaded', 'empty'] as const).map(v => (
    46â†’        <Pressable
    47â†’          key={v}
    48â†’          onPress={() => onSelect(v)}
    49â†’          style={{
    50â†’            paddingHorizontal: 16,
    51â†’            paddingVertical: 8,
    52â†’            borderRadius: 20,
    53â†’            backgroundColor: selected === v ? '#6B2FBE' : '#E8E0F0',
    54â†’          }}
    55â†’        >
    56â†’          <Text
    57â†’            type="paragraphMDM"
    58â†’            color={selected === v ? 'LIGHT_BASE_01' : 'INTENSE_COLOR_05'}
    59â†’          >
    60â†’            {labels[v]}
    61â†’          </Text>
    62â†’        </Pressable>
    63â†’      ))}
    64â†’    </View>
    65â†’  );
    66â†’}
    67â†’
    68â†’function ExtractDemo() {
    69â†’  const [view, setView] = useState<ViewState>('loaded');
    70â†’  const screen = useSDUIJsonEditor(SCREENS[view]);
    71â†’
    72â†’  return (
    73â†’    <ScrollView style={{ flex: 1 }}>
    74â†’      <View style={{ padding: 24, maxWidth: 420 }}>
    75â†’        <Text type="headingMDL" mb="nano">
    76â†’          SDUI: Extrato
    77â†’        </Text>
    78â†’        <Text type="bodyMD" mb="smaller" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
    79â†’          Renders the transaction history from JSON via SDUI engine. Transactions
    80â†’          use context interpolation â€” edit the JSON to change data dynamically.
    81â†’        </Text>
    82â†’
    83â†’        <ViewToggle selected={view} onSelect={setView} />
    84â†’
    85â†’        <Box pd="squishSmall" bgColor="LIGHT_BASE_02" br="sm">
    86â†’          <ScreenRenderer screen={screen} />
    87â†’        </Box>
    88â†’      </View>
    89â†’    </ScrollView>
    90â†’  );
    91â†’}
    92â†’
    93â†’const REAL_TRANSACTIONS = (extractHistoryLoaded.context.transactions as Record<string, string>[]).map(t => ({
    94â†’  icon: String(t.icon),
    95â†’  title: String(t.title),
    96â†’  value: String(t.value),
    97â†’  valueColor: String(t.valueColor),
    98â†’  typeLabel: String(t.typeLabel),
    99â†’  showIcon: t.showIcon !== false,
   100â†’}));
   101â†’
   102â†’const DATE_GROUPS = [
   103â†’  { label: '20 de fevereiro', items: REAL_TRANSACTIONS.slice(0, 2) },
   104â†’  { label: '18 de fevereiro', items: REAL_TRANSACTIONS.slice(2, 4) },
   105â†’  { label: '15 de fevereiro', items: REAL_TRANSACTIONS.slice(4, 5) },
   106â†’  { label: '12 de fevereiro', items: REAL_TRANSACTIONS.slice(5, 7) },
   107â†’  { label: '10 de fevereiro', items: REAL_TRANSACTIONS.slice(7, 8) },
   108â†’];
   109â†’
   110â†’const VALUE_COLOR_MAP: Record<string, string> = {
   111â†’  green: 'ACCEPT_COLOR_01',
   112â†’  red: 'DENY_COLOR_01',
   113â†’  gray: 'INTENSE_COLOR_03',
   114â†’  orange: 'ALERT_COLOR_01',
   115â†’};
   116â†’
   117â†’function RealScreenPreview() {
   118â†’  return (
   119â†’    <Box bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03" flex={1}>
   120â†’      <Header
   121â†’        title="Extrato"
   122â†’        iconLeft="icon-back"
   123â†’        hideLeftIcon={false}
   124â†’        onBack={() => {}}
   125â†’      />
   126â†’      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" mt="smaller" mb="xxxs">
   127â†’        <CardPoints
   128â†’          icon="icon-benefits"
   129â†’          iconInfo="icon-help"
   130â†’          title="Pontos disponÃ­veis"
   131â†’          valuePoints="15.320"
   132â†’          hideBottom
   133â†’          isLoading={false}
   134â†’          onPressIconInfo={() => {}}
   135â†’        />
   136â†’        <Text type="paragraphXXXL" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxs" color="INTENSE_COLOR_05">
   137â†’          LanÃ§amentos
   138â†’        </Text>
   139â†’        <SeparatorHorizontal
   140â†’          borderWidth="smaller"
   141â†’          borderColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   142â†’          height={1}
   143â†’          mb="xxxxs"
   144â†’          width="100%"
   145â†’        />
   146â†’        <SearchUsed
   147â†’          placeholder="Buscar por pontos, tipos de compra etc"
   148â†’          onChangeText={() => {}}
   149â†’          value=""
   150â†’          showIcon={false}
   151â†’          firstIcon={undefined}
   152â†’          onPressIn={() => {}}
   153â†’          numberIcon={undefined}
   154â†’          secondIcon="icon-filter-settings"
   155â†’          secondOnPress={() => {}}
   156â†’          showFilter
   157â†’        />
   158â†’      </Box>
   159â†’      <View style={{ flexDirection: 'row', marginLeft: 12, marginBottom: 4 }}>
   160â†’        <View style={{ marginRight: 16, paddingBottom: 8, borderBottomWidth: 2, borderBottomColor: '#E91E63' }}>
   161â†’          <Text type="subtitleXXL" color="INTENSE_COLOR_05">Todos</Text>
   162â†’        </View>
   163â†’        <View style={{ paddingBottom: 8 }}>
   164â†’          <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">A expirar</Text>
   165â†’        </View>
   166â†’      </View>
   167â†’      <SeparatorHorizontal width="100%" height={1} borderColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02" />
   168â†’      {DATE_GROUPS.map(group => (
   169â†’        <React.Fragment key={group.label}>
   170â†’          <Box mt="xs" mb="xxxs" ml="smaller">
   171â†’            <Text type="captionMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">{group.label}</Text>
   172â†’          </Box>
   173â†’          {group.items.map((item, idx) => (
   174â†’            <Box
   175â†’              key={idx}
   176â†’              direction
   177â†’              pd="squishSmall"
   178â†’              mb="xxxs"
   179â†’              align="center"
   180â†’              bgColor="LIGHT_BASE_01"
   181â†’              br="sm"
   182â†’              ml="smaller"
   183â†’              mr="smaller"
   184â†’              style={{ minHeight: 56 }}
   185â†’            >
   186â†’              {item.showIcon && (
   187â†’                <Box
   188â†’                  width={36}
   189â†’                  height={36}
   190â†’                  align="center"
   191â†’                  justify="center"
   192â†’                  bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   193â†’                  mr="xxxs"
   194â†’                  style={{ borderRadius: 18 }}
   195â†’                >
   196â†’                  <Icon name={item.icon} size="sm" color="INTENSE_COLOR_05" />
   197â†’                </Box>
   198â†’              )}
   199â†’              <Box flex={1}>
   200â†’                <Text type="paragraphMDM" numberOfLines={1}>{item.title}</Text>
   201â†’                <Text type="captionSM" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">{item.typeLabel}</Text>
   202â†’              </Box>
   203â†’              <Box align="flex-end">
   204â†’                <Text type="paragraphMDM" color={VALUE_COLOR_MAP[item.valueColor] ?? item.valueColor}>
   205â†’                  {item.value}
   206â†’                </Text>
   207â†’              </Box>
   208â†’            </Box>
   209â†’          ))}
   210â†’        </React.Fragment>
   211â†’      ))}
   212â†’    </Box>
   213â†’  );
   214â†’}
   215â†’
   216â†’function SideBySideComparison() {
   217â†’  const screen = useSDUIJsonEditor(extractHistoryLoaded);
   218â†’
   219â†’  return (
   220â†’    <ScrollView style={{ flex: 1 }}>
   221â†’      <View style={{ padding: 24 }}>
   222â†’        <Text type="headingMDL" mb="nano">
   223â†’          Side-by-Side: Real Screen vs SDUI
   224â†’        </Text>
   225â†’        <Text type="bodyMD" mb="smaller" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   226â†’          Left: traditional React components with hardcoded data. Right: same
   227â†’          visual result rendered entirely from JSON via the SDUI engine.
   228â†’        </Text>
   229â†’
   230â†’        <View style={{ flexDirection: 'row', gap: 24 }}>
   231â†’          <View style={{ flex: 1, maxWidth: 420 }}>
   232â†’            <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="nano" align="center">
   233â†’              Real Screen (SP_0004.1)
   234â†’            </Text>
   235â†’            <Box br="sm" style={{ overflow: 'hidden' }}>
   236â†’              <RealScreenPreview />
   237â†’            </Box>
   238â†’          </View>
   239â†’
   240â†’          <View style={{ flex: 1, maxWidth: 420 }}>
   241â†’            <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="nano" align="center">
   242â†’              SDUI from JSON
   243â†’            </Text>
   244â†’            <Box pd="squishSmall" bgColor="LIGHT_BASE_02" br="sm">
   245â†’              <ScreenRenderer screen={screen} />
   246â†’            </Box>
   247â†’          </View>
   248â†’        </View>
   249â†’
   250â†’        <SeparatorHorizontal mv="xs" />
   251â†’
   252â†’        <Box pd="innerSmall" bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02" br="sm">
   253â†’          <Text type="paragraphMDM" mb="xxxs">
   254â†’            Key difference
   255â†’          </Text>
   256â†’          <Text type="bodyMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   257â†’            The left column requires code changes to update transaction data. The
   258â†’            right column renders from JSON â€” the backend can add transactions,
   259â†’            change dates, or update points values without any frontend deploy.
   260â†’          </Text>
   261â†’        </Box>
   262â†’      </View>
   263â†’    </ScrollView>
   264â†’  );
   265â†’}
   266â†’
   267â†’const meta: Meta = {
   268â†’  title: 'SDUI/Extract History',
   269â†’  component: ExtractDemo,
   270â†’};
   271â†’
   272â†’export default meta;
   273â†’
   274â†’type Story = StoryObj<typeof meta>;
   275â†’
   276â†’export const Demo: Story = {
   277â†’  render: () => <ExtractDemo />,
   278â†’};
   279â†’
   280â†’export const Comparison: Story = {
   281â†’  name: 'Side-by-Side Comparison',
   282â†’  render: () => <SideBySideComparison />,
   283â†’};
   284â†’
